# Courtix Hosting LLC

> Delaware-registered software engineering firm with a globally distributed, remote-first team, building custom applications, cloud-native APIs and managed edge infrastructure for enterprises worldwide.

Courtix Hosting LLC is a Delaware-registered software development company (file number 4680426). Our registered business address is 8 The Green Ste A, Dover, DE 19901, USA. The engineering team is remote-first and globally distributed. We design, build, deploy and operate custom software for clients across fintech, SaaS, e-commerce, healthcare, logistics and AI.

Core competencies:
- Custom software development (TypeScript, Node.js, Go, Python)
- Cloud hosting on Cloudflare and AWS (Workers, Pages, R2, D1, EC2, RDS, S3, Lambda)
- API integration and event-driven workflows
- DevOps and Site Reliability Engineering

We accept Visa and Mastercard in US Dollars, processed through Wise (FCA firm reference 900507). Every engagement is governed by a written Secure SDLC policy, published at https://courtix.com/trust/sdlc.

Contact: hello@courtix.com · +1 (830) 293-3496

## Core pages
- [Home](https://courtix.com/): Overview of services, principles and recent work
- [Services](https://courtix.com/services): Software development, API integration and platform engineering
- [Software Development](https://courtix.com/services/software-development): Custom application engineering
- [API Integration](https://courtix.com/services/api-integration): System integration and workflow automation
- [Platform & Reliability Engineering](https://courtix.com/services/platform-reliability): CI/CD, infrastructure, managed data, observability, on-call and reliability engineering
- [Solutions](https://courtix.com/solutions): Industry-specific engagements
- [Portfolio](https://courtix.com/portfolio): Selected case studies
- [About](https://courtix.com/about): Company details, values and registration
- [Platforms](https://courtix.com/platforms): Platforms Courtix builds on and integrates with (Cloudflare, AWS, Stripe, Wise, GitHub, managed AI APIs)
- [Contact](https://courtix.com/contact): Project enquiry form

## Trust
- [Trust Center](https://courtix.com/trust): Entry point for security, SDLC and SLA documentation
- [Secure SDLC Policy](https://courtix.com/trust/sdlc): Full written secure software development lifecycle
- [Security](https://courtix.com/trust/security): Security posture and vulnerability reporting
- [Service Level Agreement](https://courtix.com/trust/sla): Availability and response commitments
